column1: 2004-06-18‚Äé"So today I spent 8 hours practicing being a suburban mom... err... what I meant to say is I was babysitting.  Well
column2: by babysitting I mean I was sitting on the designer couch reading ""Little New York Bastard"".  It's not like I'm lazy or anything
column3: I just didn't want to follow the kids around all creepy-like while they did their own things.  Speaking of creepy
column4: thier house kinda gave me the willies.  It was so immaculately clean and potterybarnesque
column5: I didn't want to touch anything.  It was creepy."

column2: i did not pay these people to pretend to be my friends... well not much anyway urlLink

column1: 2004-06-17‚Äéso yes this is my very first blog entry.  I have joined the 21st century horray!!!!  I just thought i should give you all a nice glimpse into chaos and insanity that is my world.  so ta-ta

2004-07-02‚ÄéurlLink    So guess who I ran into on tuesday???  Yeah thats right good ole Billy Boy.  That also happened to be the first night I have ever spent the night on a sidewalk.  Urban camping?  No
column2: we were goin to the book signing.  So Blakely
column4: and I left her house at midnight to camp out the meet Clinton.  So 16 hours later we didn't get him to sign our books but we were photographed by 4 newspapers and filmed by 2 newsguys.  We were on fire.  But as he was leaving the building I saw his hair and even his face for a good 2 seconds.  I mean I looked into the eyes of Bill Clinton!!!! (GASP). All and all not bad. urlLink
